title: Resolution Adopting the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) and Association of Municipal Employees of Los Baños - Laguna (AMELBA - UNA) Joint 2022 - 01 Dated February 2, 2022 Entitled: Resolution Prescribing the New Guidelines on the Grant of Collective Negotiation Agreement (CNA) Incentive Effective Cy 2022 and Every Year Thereafter. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 02/08/2022)
